name: Open Ingress Port 22 on Security Group
description: Simulates an attacker opening port 22 (SSH) to the world (0.0.0.0/0) on a security group to allow direct access to EC2 instances, bypassing network-layer controls.
detection_signal: ec2:AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress with CidrIp=0.0.0.0/0 or CidrIpv6=::/0 on port 22 — indicates deliberate exposure of SSH access
